title: Nandini
desc: A man marries a shape-shifting serpent and they have two daughters. Later, the sisters embark on a revenge killing spree.

title: Vitala Vitala Panduranga
desc: Despite the trials and tribulations she faces, Sakhu, a devout believer, finds her faith in Lord Vithala Panduranga propelling her towards divinity.

title: Guru Shisyaru
desc: Several disciples are cursed by an angel and the conjuration cannot be broken until the angel gets married. On behalf of their teacher, they engage in a series of acts to defeat his foes.

title: Nandini
desc: A man marries a shape-shifting serpent and they have two daughters. Later, the sisters embark on a revenge killing spree.

title: Krishna Vamshi
desc: Vamshika, who always yearned for a close-knit family, marries into a bustling household. Subsequently, she navigates various challenges and traditions to win the hearts of her new in-laws.

title: Vitala Vitala Panduranga
desc: Despite the trials and tribulations she faces, Sakhu, a devout believer, finds her faith in Lord Vithala Panduranga propelling her towards divinity.

title: Naga Mani
desc: Unbeknownst to the peril that shadows them, a pair of shapeshifting serpents reincarnate to finish their epic love story.

title: Mugguti Malli
desc: A woman with unparalleled culinary expertise works in a large household and crosses paths with a man who falls in love with her at first sight.

title: Ramachari
desc: Rama, a simple man, is appointed to protect Nandini, a rich heiress. Things take a turn when they fall in love and her brothers learn about their affair.

title: Parijatha
desc: Parijatha values family and empathy, while Sarojadevi prioritises social status. Subsequently, their contrasting beliefs lead to a dynamic where Parijatha faces trials to defend her principles.

title: Ratha Sapthami
desc: As Sapthami's selflessness breeds complications, Sreemanth's self-centeredness erodes family bonds. However, soon fate plays a hand, intertwining their opposing lives.

title: Sindhu Bhairavi
desc: Sindhu, a brave young woman, loves to spread happiness and cheer all around. However, on witnessing injustice, Sindhu takes matters into her own hands.

title: Mangalya
desc: Mayuri, a bold girl raised in poverty, fulfills her duties for a wealthy family as one of their own. However, things become complicated when Tarak, the family's alcoholic son, marries her.

title: Shambhavi
desc: A young girl possesses the quality of transforming into a Goddess during the time of crisis in order to confront the evil and protect the victims.

title: Mugguti Malli
desc: A woman with unparalleled culinary expertise works in a large household and crosses paths with a man who falls in love with her at first sight.

title: Shanti Nivasa
desc: While leading a happy life, as the ideal daughter-in-law of a reputed family, Shanthi falls victim to the vengeance of Manthra.

title: Myna
desc: Born into a life of hardship, Myna faces familial and financial struggles. Subsequently, she leaves her home to carve a better future, fighting against all odds for her family's sake.

desc: Vamshika, who always yearned for a close-knit family, marries into a bustling household. Subsequently, she navigates various challenges and traditions to win the hearts of her new in-laws.

title: Anu Pallavi
desc: An IAS officer and single mother meets a suspended officer and single dad, leading to conflicts, emotional bonds and a journey of parenting, love and second chances.

title: Sevanthi
desc: Sevanthi, an orphaned girl, embarks on a journey to find her family. Through fate, she unknowingly draws closer to her past, with Arjun, an advocate by her side.

title: Udaya Music
desc: A complete collection of soulful hymns and songs from well-known Kannada movies performed by several renowned singers and musicians, played in a loop.

title: Bhakti Sudhe
desc: The host presents information on various temples that are considered to have a profound cultural and sentimental significance.

title: Teleshopping
desc: Learn about a wide selection of products and take advantage of a convenient method of shopping. A show for those who love to shop from the comforts of their home.

title: Nandini
desc: A shapeshifting serpent, strives to seek revenge from her family, eventually reconciling with her long-lost sister and attempts to reclaim the 'kala chakras'.
